GB 30255一2019
quirements
GB/T 29293 ,Measurement methods of the performance for LED downlights
GB/T 29294, Performance requirements for LED downjights
GB/T 29295, Test methoas of performance of sef ballastea LED reflector /amps
GB/T 29296, Selfballastead LED reflector /amps一Performance requirements
GB/T 31112, Classification of Non-directional Selfballasted LED-lamps for general 1ighting services
3 Terms and definitions
For the purpose of this document, the terms and definitions given in GB/T 24826, GB/T 24908. GB/
T 29294, GB/T 29296 and GB/T 31112 and the following apply.
3.1
minimum allowable values of energy efficiency for LED downlights
the minimum allowable value of Iuminous efficacy of the LED downlight under the specified
testing conditions
3.2
minimium allowable vaules of energy efficiency for directional integrated LED lamps
the minimum allowable value of Iluminous efficacy of the directional integrated LED lamp under the
specified testing conditions
3.3
minimium allowable vaules of energy efficiency for non-directional self-ballasted LED lamps
the minimum allowable value of Iluminous efficacy of the non-directional self-ballasted LED lamp
under the specified testing conditions
4 Technical requirements
4.1 Energy efficiency grades
4.1.1 The energy efficiency levels of LED products for indoor lighting are classified into three
grades,，of which Grade 1 is the most efficient.
2
